title: Set up project documentation
subtasks: Create a README with project overview
Document API endpoints with examples
Add setup and installation instructions
Write contribution guidelines

title: Review pull requests from the team
subtasks: Check out each branch locally
Run tests and verify functionality
Leave inline comments for suggestions
Approve or request changes

title: Fix login bug reported by QA
subtasks: Reproduce the bug in the dev environment
Identify the root cause in the auth flow
Write a failing test that covers the case
Implement the fix and verify the test passes
Deploy the fix to staging for QA sign-off

title: create a claude project
subtasks: Log in to the Anthropic console.
Navigate to the 'Projects' section and select 'Create New Project'.
Enter a project name and configure any initial settings.
Generate and securely store an API key for the new project.

title: create a project to track daily schedule
subtasks: Select a digital tool or platform (e.g., spreadsheet, Notion, Trello).
Define the key information to track for each schedule item (e.g., task, time, duration, priority).
Set up the project structure within the chosen tool (e.g., create columns, lists, or templates).
Populate with initial schedule items and test the tracking process.

title: create how to connect claude to salesforce mcp
subtasks: Research Salesforce MCP APIs and Claude's API capabilities for integration methods.
Define a specific integration use case and map the data flow between Claude and MCP.
Outline technical steps for API configuration, data mapping, and any custom development.
Draft the complete 'how-to' guide, including prerequisites, example usage, and troubleshooting.

title: Test task to verify timezone fix
subtasks: Review timezone fix details and identify affected system components.
Develop test cases covering various timezones, DST transitions, and date ranges.
Configure test environment and execute defined test cases.
Verify correct time display, storage, and calculations across all scenarios.
